summary: This is the final delivery for Bounty #77. It implements the docs-doctor skill using the strict 5-agent methodology, adhering to the single-commit evidence hash rule.

observations.detail: Executed locally on WSL Ubuntu 26.04 using runx CLI version 0.6.14. Production keys loaded via .runx-env.
All artifacts, X.yaml, SKILL.md, and fixtures are pinned strictly to the single commit ea89ad1f22d02df22ce5cd4d55cf43e2159dcdc2 in umbtest03/runx.
Local inline harness execution returned 2/2 PASSED with zero assertion errors for both stale-docs (sealed) and fresh-docs (failure).
Local dogfood execution via 'runx skill' successfully generated a cryptographically signed execution receipt for the docs-doctor logic.
The generated receipt sha256:4ccebe2546e433a568776fd53b53e050c42f323639a95fa4807dc5b3d5a434e5 passed 'runx verify' successfully (valid: true).
SKILL.md satisfies operator profile requirements with >100 lines describing architecture, input schemas, and expected outputs.
